You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Vineet Singh is currently working as Assistant Professor in the department of Pharmacy, SGSITS, Indore .His research interest includes anti-cancer drug discovery, Impurity synthesis, isolation, and profiling. He has more than 18 years of experience. Education and Qualification: S.No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 Ph.D. Pharmacy (Polymers for Drug Delivery Systems) 2012 Rajiv Gandhi Technical University, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, INDIA 2 M. Pharm. Medicinal and Pharmaceutical Chemistry 2002 Rajiv Gandhi Technical University, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, INDIA 3 B. Pharm. - 2000 Hemwati Nandan Bahuguna Garhwal University, Garhwal, Uttrakhand, INDIA Work Experience: Research Details: Research Interest: Anti-cancer drug discovery – Tyrosine kinase inhibitors Impurity synthesis, isolation, and profiling. Polymers for drug delivery systems – Synthesis & Functionalization of Polymers. PhD Supervision: Publications: Research Paper Publications < View > Projects: Testing & Consultancy: Other Details: List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized 1. Co-Chairperson Souvenir Committee “ APTICON 2015, 9 th to 11th October 2015. Dr. (Mrs.) Meena Tiwari Professor Employee ID: 200 Qualification: Ph.D. :2531 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr.(Mrs.) Meena Tiwari is working as Professor in the department of Pharmacy, SGSITS, Indore. Her research interest includes Drug Design, Polymer Chemistry & Pharmaceutical Analysis. She has more than 30 years of teaching experience. Education and Qualification: S.No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 Phd Medicinal Chemistry 1988 Dept. of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Dr. H.S. Gour Vishwavidyalaya, Sagar, MP 2 M. Pharm Medicinal Chemistry 1983 Dept. of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Dr. H.S. Gour Vishwavidyalaya, Sagar, MP 3 B. Pharm Pharmacy 1981 Dept. of Pharmaceutical Sciences, Dr. H.S. Gour Vishwavidyalaya, Sagar, MP Work Experience: S. No. Year Post 1 2006- Present Professor, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology & Science Indore M.P 2 2012-2014 Dean, Faculty of Pharmacy, RGPV, Bhopal 3 2009-2011 Head of Department, Pharmacy, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology & Science Indore 4 2000-2006 Associate Professor, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology & Science Indore M.P 5 1991-2000 Assistant Professor, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology & Science Indore M.P Research Details: Research Interests: Drug design and discovery, Structure-Based and Ligand-Based Drug Design, Chemoinformatics, Lead Identification, Antiretroviral Drug Development, Analytical Method Development, Polymer Chemistry, PhD Supervision: Publications: Publications in Peer-Reviewed Journals: Book Chapter 3 International Publications 25 National Publications 15 Scientific Presentations 50 Research Publication Details: < View > Projects: Research Grants: UGC grant under MAJOR RESEARCH PROJECT entitled “Design, synthesis and biological evaluation of some novel anti-HIV agents.” AICTE grant under RESEARCH PROMOTION SCHEME entitled “Design and synthesis of combinatorial libraries of carbonic anhydrase inhibitors with therapeutic potential.” Testing & Consultancy: Other Details: Society Memberships: Life Member, Association of Pharmaceutical Teachers of India Life Member, Indian Pharmaceutical Association Life Member, Indian Society for Technical Education Honors/Awards: 2008 Prof M.L. Khurana Award for Best Paper in Indian Journal of Pharmaceutical Sciences. APTICON Best paper award 2015. 2018 Prof. M.L Khurana award for Best Paper in Indian Journal of Pharmaceutical Sciences. Journal Reviewer: Journal of Medicinal Chemistry Medicinal Chemistry Research Bioorganic Medicinal Chemistry Letters Arabian Journal of Chemistry Dr. Suresh Paswan Associate Professor Employee ID: 9344 Qualification: M.Pharma. : 2538 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Mr. Suresh Paswan is working as Assistant Professor in the department of Pharmacy, SGSITS, Indore. His research interest includes Nanotechnology; Microparticulate systems; Targeted drug delivery system; Spray drying technology, Solubility enhancement methods, Permeability studies; Formulation Development of Tablet, Capsule, Parenteral. He has more than 20 years of teaching experience. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 M. Pharmacy Industrial Pharmacy 2001 Shri G. S. Institute of Technolology & Science., Indore, Univ: RGPV, Bhopal 2 B. Pharmacy Pharmacy 1998 RVS college of pharmacy, Coimbatore , Univ: The TN Dr. MGR Medical University, Chennai Research Details: Research Interests : Nanotechnology; Microparticulate systems; Targeted drug delivery system; Spray drying technology, Solubility enhancement methods, Permeability studies; Formulation Development of Tablet, Capsule, Parenterals Publications: International/National Journal Publications S.No. Title Year 1 Rupesh Bhawsar, Suresh Kumar Paswan*, Prakash Kumar Soni and T. R. Saini “Development and Optimization of Mucoadhesive Microspheres of Miconazole Nitrate” International journal of pharmacy & Life Sciences 10(5): May, 2019:6296-6319 2019 2 Gulfisha Shaikh, Prakash K. Soni, Suresh K. Paswan, and T. R. Saini, “Design and Development of Mucoadhesive Borax Glycerin Films for Treatment of Canker Sore”, Journal of emerging technologies and innovative research , Feb 2019, 6(2): 1215-1222 2019 3 Suresh K. Paswan & T. R. Saini, “ Purification of Drug Loaded PLGA Nanoparticles Prepared by Emulsification Solvent Evaporation Using Stirred Cell Ultrafiltration Technique”Pharmaceutical Research Dec 2017, 34 (12), 2779-2786. 2017 4 Patel N. K., Chouhan P, Paswan SK, Soni PK, “Development and validation of a UV spectrophotometric method for simultaneous estimation of combination of Montelukast sodium in presence of Levocetirizine Dihydrochloride”, Der Pharmacia Lettre, 2014, 6 (3), 313-321. 2014 5 Ghosh S., Acharya M. M. and Paswan S. K., “Gene delivery and targeting: A therapeutic approach”, Indian Drugs, 42(7), July 2005, 405-416. 2005 International/National Conference Publications 1 Best poster award in IPC 2017 on “Development of Nanocarier based Targeted Drug Delivery System of Tamoxifen Citrate for Breast Cancer”. 2017 Projects: S.No. Title Amount Source of fund Year 1 Designing and Computer aided Optimization of Site specific Tumor Targeted Nanotechnology based Drug Delivery System Rs 900000/- AICTE 2010 to 2014 2 Development of Nanocarier Based Targeted Drug Delivery System for Treatment of Cancer Rs 500000/- MPCST 2012 to 2016 Other Details: List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized 1. Conducted Seminar on “Enhance Employable skill in pharmaceutical Industry to fresh Graduate/ Students in Pharma/Life Sciences Strengthening under II linkage initiatives” with APTICO. 2. “44th National Pharmacy Week” organized by Indian Pharmaceutical Association, Delhi Branch held on 20th - 26th November 2005. Invited Lectures/Expert Talks/Chairmanships at Conferences 1. Convener of technical committee at 35th MP young Scientist Congress held at SGSITS during Feb 28-29, 2020 2. Expert lecture at “Intellectual property rights and patent filing through startups” at SATI, Vidisha 3. Chairman (Registration Committee) in Pharma Meet 2018, Indore on 8th April 2018 4. Chairperson (Registration Committee) in Pharma Meet 2017, Indore on 14th April 2017. 5. Member (Local organizing committe) in Pharma Meet 2016, Indore on 13th March 2016. 6. Co-Chairman (Scientific Services Committee) in Pharma Meet 2014, Indore on 2 nd March 2014. 7. Co-Chairman (Scientific Services Committee) in 3rd Indian Pharmaceutical Association Convention 2011, Indore on 19th & 20th February 2011. Dr. Prakash Soni Associate Professor Employee ID: 617 Qualification: M.Pharma. : 2692 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Mr. Prakash Soni is currently working as Assistant Professor in the department of Pharmacy, SGSITS, Indore .His research interest includes pharmaceutical nanotechnology, novel drug delivery system. He has more than 14 years of teaching experience. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 M.Pharm Industrial Pharmacy 2007 RGPV, Bhopal 2 B.Pharm Pharmacy 2004 RGPV, Bhopal Research Details: Research Interests: Pharmaceutical Nanotechnology Liposomal Drug Delivery Ocular Nanomedicine Novel Drug Delivery System Pharmaceutical Technology Pharmaceutical Dosage Form Development Nano- Drug-carriers Solid Lipid Nanoparticles, etc Publications: Research Paper Publications https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Myt24vcAAAAJ&hl=en Other Details: Patents and Awards: US Patent (US 2010/0016322 A1): Water Dispersible Pharmaceutical Formulation and Process for Preparing the Same WIPO PCT Patent (WO 2008/104996 A2): Water Dispersible Pharmaceutical Formulation and Process for Preparing the Same Dr. Shubham Sharma Assistant Professor Employee ID: 685 Qualification: PhD : : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Shubham Sharma is working as Assistant Professor in the department of Pharmacy, SGSITS, Indore. His research interest includes Novel Drug Delivery System, Ocular Drug Delivery System, Sustained Drug Delivery System, Nutraceutical, . He has more than 12 years of teaching experience. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 1 PhD Pharmaceutics 2024 Devi Ahilya Vishwavidhyalaya 2 M. Pharm Pharmaceutics 2012 RGPV University 3 B. Pharm Pharmacy 2009 RGPV University Research Details: Research Interests: Novel Drug Delivery System Ocular Drug Delivery System Sustained Drug Delivery System Controlled Release Formulations Nutraceutical Conventional Drug Delivery System Herbal Formulation Publications: Research Paper Publications: S.No. Title Year 1 Sharma S.* and Padiyar A.; A review on tuberculosis and its present scenario, World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 4, Issue 10 2018 2 Sharma S.*; A review on immunosupressive agents; World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 5, Issue 2 2019 3 Sharma S.*; A review on local anaesthetics; World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 5, Issue 11 2019 4 Sharma S.*; A review on diuretics; World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 6, Issue 3 2020 5 Sharma S.*; A review on microencapsulation; World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 6, Issue 10 2020 6 Sharma S.* ; A review on tuberculosis and its diagnosis; World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 7, Issue 2 2021 7 Sharma S.*; A review on antifungal agents; World Journal of Pharmaceutical and Life Sciences; Vol. 6, Issue 2 2020 8 Pathak.P, Sharma.S, Padiyar.A; Review on microemulsion; an unconventional drug delivery system ; World Journal of Pharmacy and Pharmaceutical Sciences; Vol. 5, Issue 4 2018 etc, Other Details: List of Conferences/Workshops/Seminars Organized/Attended : ◼ Organized webinar as committee member on “Drug Discovery through Natural Products” on Saturday, 20th June 2020. SGSITS, Indore (M.P.) ◼ Building INDIA into a Pharma Superpower (2020), 18th IPA PHARMA MEET 2018. ◼ Computational Chemistry and Chemical Technology, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science, in association with University of Porto, Portugal under Global Initiative of Academic Networks. ◼ Drug discovery through natural products, Department of pharmacy, Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science (M.P.) ◼ Enhancement of Testing and Consultancy in Institute, Organized by Shri G.S. Institute of Technology and Science (M.P.) ◼ Comprehensive Quality Initiatives for Higher Education in Pandemic Era, Organized by Internal Quality Assurance Cell of Uka Tarsadia University (UTU), Bardoli, Gujarat ◼ COVID 19 Outbreak: Challenges and Opportunities in Higher Education, organized by B.R. Nahata College of Pharmacy, Mandsaur and Madhya Pradesh Council of Science and Technology, Bhopal (M.P.) ◼ Insight into Patent Filing Procedure for Researchers ( National Conference), Organized by Career Point University, Kota, Rajasthan ◼ Understanding Practice School & its Concept in UG Pharmacy Education, Organized by JSS Academy of Higher Education & Research. ◼ Responsibilities, Opportunities & Possibilities in Pharmaceuticals in Current Scenario of Covid-19, Organized by Sagar Institute of Research Technology & Science-Pharmacy, Near ISRO, Ayodhya Nagar, Bhopal M.P in Association with APTI, IPA, IHPA, IPES, SSIRT and Curewell . ◼ Planning and execution - An interactive session with a Renowned Pharmaceutical Scientist- Dr. Vandana Patravale, Organized by Dr. D. Y. Patil Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences & Research, Pimpri, Pune ◼ COVID 19 and Lifestyle Disorders: Organized by B.R.
